name: Anomaly: Excessive Firewall Accepts Across Multiple Hosts
notes: Reports excessive Firewall Accepts across multiple hosts.  More than 100 events were detected across at least 100 unique destination IP addresses in 5 minutes.
bb_references: BB:DeviceDefinition: FW / Router / Switch with the same source IP more than 150 times
conditions_text: when the domain is one of the following Array
when an event matches any of the following BB:HostDefinition: Servers

when any of these BB:CategoryDefinition: Firewall or ACL Accept, BB:DeviceDefinition: FW / Router / Switch with the same source IP more than 150 times, across more than 150 destination IP within 5 minutes
thresholds: when any of these BB:CategoryDefinition: Firewall or ACL Accept, BB:DeviceDefinition: FW / Router / Switch with the same source IP more than 150 times, across more than 150 destination IP within 5 minutes
TD_list: APPLY Anomaly: Excessive Firewall Accepts Across Multiple Hosts on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the domain is one of the following Array
AND NOT when an event matches any of the following BB:HostDefinition: Servers

AND when any of these BB:CategoryDefinition: Firewall or ACL Accept, BB:DeviceDefinition: FW / Router / Switch with the same source IP more than 150 times, across more than 150 destination IP within 5 minutes
RED_list: Event name: Excessive Firewall Accepts Across Multiple Hosts

Event description: Excessive Firewall Accepts were detected across multiple hosts.  More than 100 events were detected across at least 100 unique destination IP addresses in 5 minutes. -- Decreased Sensivity : from 100 to 150 , and severity : from 7, to 6
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
Include detected events by "Source IP" from this point forward, in the offense, for 300 second(s)
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
